scripts.boilerplate: VERSION=$(grep -o '"frankenstyle"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"[^"]*"' package.json | head -1 | sed -E 's/.*"([^"]+)"/\1/' | sed -E 's/^[^0-9]*//') && cp boilerplate.txt public/boilerplate.txt && sed -i.bak "s/\${version}/${VERSION}/g" public/boilerplate.txt && rm public/boilerplate.txt.bak
